headline: Costco just got its dream economy
summary: Americans are feeling increasingly uneasy about the economy. Consumer sentiment has been alarmingly weak, according to recent University of Michigan sentiment readings. At the same time, inflation has soared since the Iran war broke out. In April, the Consumer Price Index rose 3.8% on a ...

headline: Celsius: Competition Concerns Create A Compelling Buying Opportunity
summary: Celsius is down 37% amid Costco competition. Explore valuation at 19x forward earnings, long-term tailwinds, and profitability. See more on CELH stock here.
